phases.name: anchor_entities
phases.notes: Create canonical identifiers and transcript references before evidence joins.

phases.name: gene_level_evidence
phases.notes: Load perturbation evidence and predictor scores, then refresh pair rollups.

phases.name: site_and_mre_evidence
phases.notes: Preserve raw intervals first, then transcript overlaps, then selected-transcript site summaries.

phases.name: transcript_context
phases.notes: Add localization labels and transcript feature context after anchor transcript entities exist.

phases.name: literature
phases.notes: Store raw mentions first; only add assertion rows after normalization or curation.

phases.name: provenance_refresh
phases.notes: Record checksums and update pair support summaries after each ingest batch.
